items.title: J&K: BSF woman constable dies by suicide in Jammu
items.summary: A 31-year-old BSF constable allegedly died by suicide in Jammu's Gadigarh camp. Constable Vanita Rani was found hanging from a ceiling fan with a dupatta. Her body was sent for...

items.title: VCK turns its focus to Tamil nationalism post-election
items.summary: VCK founder and Chidambaram MP Thol. Thirumavalavan has urged the party to gear up for a ‘Tamil nationalist’ public rally on August 17 in Ulundurpet near Villupuram

items.title: US, Lebanese delegations meet to discuss Israeli ‘pilot zones’ withdrawal
items.summary: Sources tell Al Jazeera that talks are focused on establishing mechanism for first of two so-called "pilot zones".
